subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, wherein He maketh mention of such as have turned unto His Supreme Horizon and uttered His praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و فیه یذکر من اقبل الی افقه الاعلی و نطق بثنائه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
